col1: 1875 Ordinances of the City of Orlando, Florida, October 1, 1893 : It was decided at said election [July 31, 1875]... that its boundaries should be, 'one mile due east, one mile due west, one mile due north and one mile due south (from the court house) forming a square;' (map)
1957 Reprint of the Comprehensive City Plan: Orlando, Florida, December 1959
